practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the bit-manipulation clues
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right idea for XOR canceling, last-bit checking, and powers of two.
hints: AND with 1 checks the last bit.
A power of two has exactly one 1 bit.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the main bit clues.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck XOR canceling, last-bit checking, and the power-of-two shape.

blanks.label: Main clue for checking the last bit
Main clue for powers of two
